Title: Organic Ceremonial Matcha Green Tea Powder
Smart Collections: All Teas; Focus and Energy; Matcha
Body HTML: First harvest, shade-grown, stone-ground, our Ceremonial Matcha from Shizuoka is the real deal. Smooth, naturally sweet, and free of the bitterness that plagues lower grades. Whisk it, latte it, blend it. It holds up beautifully in all three.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Smooth, naturally sweet, with a subtle umami finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Any time of day, whisked traditionally or as a latte

Title: Chinese Jasmine Green Tea
Body HTML: Delicate green tea meets fragrant jasmine blossoms and the result is pure magic. Naturally sweet, beautifully floral, and so smooth it practically drinks itself. The kind of cup that turns a regular afternoon into something worth savouring.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Floral, lightly sweet, delicate with a clean finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon, on its own, never with milk

Title: Chocolate Mint Black Tea
Body HTML: Your favourite dessert, in a cup. Smooth Ceylon black tea layered with cocoa shells and peppermint for a rich, cool, deeply satisfying brew. Indulgent enough to feel like a treat, light enough to drink any time. The after-dinner tea you didn't know you needed.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Rich chocolate, cool mint, smooth with a sweet finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Afternoon or after dinner on its own or with a splash of milk

Title: Classic English Breakfast Black Tea
Body HTML: Bold enough to wake you up. Smooth enough to keep you coming back. A full-bodied breakfast blend that holds up beautifully with milk or stands strong on its own. No drama, just a really great cup, every single morning.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Rich, malty, full-bodied with a smooth finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning with or without milk

Title: Culinary Matcha Green Tea Powder
Body HTML: Not all matcha is made for the bowl and this one knows it. Our Culinary Matcha is bold, earthy, and built for everything else: lattes, smoothies, baked goods, overnight oats. That vivid green colour and punchy matcha flavour, in everything you make.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Earthy, robust, with a bold matcha flavour
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: In lattes, smoothies, baking, and cooking

Title: Divine Earl Grey Black Tea
Body HTML: The classic, done right. Bold Assam black tea meets fragrant bergamot and delicate rose petals for a cup that's floral, smooth, and quietly luxurious. The Earl Grey you will finally stop settling for something less than.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Floral, citrus bergamot, smooth with a sweet finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon on its own or with a splash of milk

Title: Divine Ruby Red Iced Tea
Body HTML: The one that looks as good as it tastes. Rooibos, hibiscus, berries, and rosehips brew into a stunning deep ruby red that's tropical, aromatic, and completely caffeine free. Cold brew it, pour it over ice, and watch everyone ask what you're drinking.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Tropical, fruity, lightly tart with a smooth rooibos base
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Cold over ice any time of day

Title: Divine Tangy Lemon Iced Tea
Body HTML: Sunshine in a glass. Lemongrass, citrus fruits, and lemon verbena come together in a bright, zesty brew that's crisp, refreshing, and completely caffeine free. Brew it hot, pour it over ice, and watch it disappear faster than you expected.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Bright citrus, zesty, lightly sweet with a clean lemongrass finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Cold over ice, any time of day

Title: Hibiscus Punch Herbal Tea
Smart Collections: All Teas; Detox; Herbal Tea; Immunity
Body HTML: Some teas are subtle. This one is not. Deep ruby red, naturally tart, and packed with Vitamin C from hibiscus, cranberries, and blackcurrants. Caffeine free and bold as anything hot, cold, or straight over ice. One sip and you'll get it.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Tart, fruity, deep with a cranberry-hibiscus finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Any time of day hot or cold brewed over ice

Title: Japanese Genmaicha Green Tea
Tags: Category_Tea, Function_Focus and Energy, Type_Green Tea
Smart Collections: All Teas; Focus and Energy; Green Tea
Body HTML: Green tea got a glow-up. Our Genmaicha blends smooth Japanese green tea with toasted brown rice for a warm, nutty cup that's comforting, light on caffeine, and completely unlike anything else in your collection.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Nutty, toasty, smooth with a hint of green freshness
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon, perfect on its own or alongside a meal

Title: Japanese Sencha Green Tea
Tags: Category_Tea, Function_Focus and Energy, Type_Green Tea
Smart Collections: All Teas; Focus and Energy; Green Tea
Body HTML: Japan's go-to green tea for a reason. Steamed fresh after harvest, our Sencha delivers a crisp, vibrant cup with subtle sweetness and smooth, natural energy. Light, refreshing, and easy to love, your new daily ritual in a cup.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Fresh, grassy, lightly sweet with a clean finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon, on its own, never with milk

Title: Masala Chai Black Tea
Body HTML: Bold Assam black tea, whole spices, and zero shortcuts. Our Masala Chai is warming, rich, and deeply satisfying, the kind of cup that lingers long enough to make you want another. Brew it strong, add steamed milk, and let it do its thing.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Warm, bold, spiced with a sweet finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon on its own or as a chai latte

Title: Moroccan Mint Iced Tea
Body HTML: Fresh, cool, and effortlessly refreshing. Organic green tea meets mint and green rooibos for a light, crisp brew that's as good hot as it is ice cold. Inspired by the mint teas of North Africa, simple, clean, and impossible to put down.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Fresh, minty, light with a clean green tea base
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Cold over ice morning or afternoon

Title: Mumbai Chai Black Tea
Body HTML: If Masala Chai is the classic, Mumbai Chai is what happens when you turn it up. More cardamom. More ginger. More of everything that makes a chai worth drinking. Brew it strong, add steamed milk, and don't be surprised when it becomes the only chai you reach for.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Bold, spicy, warming — cardamom forward with a ginger kick
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or anytime you need something with a bit more fire

Title: Organic Assam Black Tea
Body HTML: One ingredient, one origin, one of the best black teas in the world. Bold, malty, and deeply full-bodied, our single origin Assam does exactly what great tea should do. No additives, no shortcuts, just the leaf doing what it does best.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Bold, malty, rich with a smooth finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning with or without milk

Title: Organic Turmeric Herbal Tea
Smart Collections: All Teas; Detox; Herbal Tea; Immunity
Body HTML: Two ingredients. Thousands of years of tradition. Organic turmeric and black pepper, a pairing trusted for centuries for good reason. Earthy, warming, and caffeine free. The cup that quietly earns its place in your routine.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Earthy, warm, lightly spiced with a gentle pepper finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon on its own or with a touch of honey

Title: Passion Berry Iced Tea
Body HTML: Tropical, berry-forward, and made for warm days. Rooibos meets a bold berry blend for a naturally sweet, caffeine free brew that's as vibrant as it tastes. Cold brew it overnight and you will have the best thing in your fridge. Guaranteed.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Berry, tropical, naturally sweet with a smooth rooibos base
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Cold over ice afternoon or evening

Title: Peach Mango Tango Green Tea
Body HTML: Sweet, fruity, and exactly what it promises. Smooth Sencha meets juicy mango and sun-ripened peach for a cup that's bright, tropical, and impossible not to love. Hot or cold brewed, it's a vibe either way.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Sweet, fruity, tropical with a light green tea base
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Afternoon, hot or cold brewed over ice

Title: Rainbow Rain Green Tea
Body HTML: Bold berries meet smooth Sencha and the result is a cup that's as vibrant as it looks. Elderberries, blackcurrant, and blueberries give this blend a naturally sweet, floral depth that you didn't know you needed. Hot or cold brewed, it's always a good idea.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Floral, berry-forward, lightly sweet with a clean green tea finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or afternoon, on its own or cold brewed over ice

Title: Red Roses Black Tea
Body HTML: Quietly luxurious and worth every sip. Organic black tea blended with real rose petals for a cup that's floral, smooth, and just a little bit special. Beautiful enough to gift, good enough to keep entirely for yourself.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Floral, lightly sweet, smooth with a gentle astringency

Body HTML: Japan has been perfecting matcha for centuries, and ours starts the same way - shade-grown, stone-ground, nothing added. Smooth enough for a quiet morning cup, versatile enough for lattes, smoothies, and baking. Whatever you're making, it makes it better.

Title: Tropical Sunshine Green Tea
Body HTML: One sip and you are somewhere warmer. Orange peel, pineapple, and calendula petals blended with smooth Sencha for a bright, citrusy cup that's pure tropical energy. Summer in a cup, all year round.

Title: Wine Berry Herbal Tea
Body HTML: Full-bodied, fruity, and unapologetically bold. Hibiscus, rosehips, blackcurrant, and cranberries come together in a deep ruby brew that drinks like something special. Caffeine free and naturally vibrant, the one you pull out when you want something that actually feels like a moment.
